en: When the Anne's away, the mice get perms.
ko: 앤이 없을 때, 쥐들은 파마를 해.

en: The vote is in an hour. Okay, we need to have an emergency strategy session now.
What about the perm? The perm must wait, Autumn!
Do you hear that galloping? Mm-hmm. What? Oh, my...
Look at that! Joe Biden on a horse shirtless.
That's amazing! Hello, Oren. Thank you so much for applying.
Now leave. Hey, give him a chance.
What makes you qualified for animal control? I studied zoology in college,
and I can control animals with my mind. Get out.
ko: 그리고 내 마음으로 동물을 조종할 수 있어.

en: I made you say that. I liked him.
You undercook fish, believe it or not, jail.
ko: 생선을 덜 익히면, 믿거나 말거나, 감옥이야.

en: You overcook chicken, also jail. Undercook, overcook.
You make an appointment with a dentist and you don't show up, believe it or not, jail, right away.
We have the best patients in the world. Because of jail.
ko: 우리는 세계 최고의 환자를 가지고 있어.
